title: 金鯱賞の後に・受け継いだ光

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, the bountiful luck I gathered stood no
chance against Doto!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I concede! You are truly... Buddha's chosen child!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto secures a win against
Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Since you are the victor of this race... I shall
celebrate by imparting all my luck unto you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O shimmering light! I ask you to descend upon
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, what is this... light?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doto, I call myself your best friend, and yet I've
never done a single thing for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which is why, please, you must take this
mysterious lucky power. It is the least I can do! I
give my protection to you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whatever toils and troubles come your way, with
this light by your side, you will be fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, you're bound to feel lucky! I
can't do anything to prove that, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: It'll make me feel lucky? Th-thank you so much, Fukuki—no, Master Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I vow to go on with this light by my side! I won't
bow down to any baseless negativity on my part!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the effects of Matikanefukukitaru's
celebratory ritual remain a mystery, it appears
she orchestrated this challenge to send Doto on
with her good-luck wishes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! What a marvelous ceremony of
inheritance! It appears the time has finally come!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! I congratulate you on your stunning
victory! And rejoice for our glorious path lying
ahead!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, come hither. We must travel to our fated
place, the festival of spring, the Takarazuka
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Consider this a personal invitation. You may
accept—if you're willing to become my knight,
that is!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Your knight...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you think I can do it? Can I... protect
Opera O?!
choice_data_list: Of course you can—no doubt about it!
Of course you can—no doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! Then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there with you at the Takarazuka Kinen,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lively, high-pitched voice echoes far and
wide. After a long period of small victories,
Meisho Doto finally stands at her idol's side.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if today is anything to go by... I think I'll
be able to hold my own against other racers in a
senior G1.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My body and heart have become stronger, and
now, I even have luck with me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heheheh... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That was a decent run, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But don't get it twisted. The reason you won
today has nothing to do with your heart or any of
that mushy crap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your numbers were enough... for today. It's that
damn simple.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, Shakur... I thought you said before that I
wasn't enough...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, 'cause you were all brawn, no bite.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You were getting physically stronger, sure, but
you were still lacking the mental coordination to
use your body effectively.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But someone's been slowly building up your inner
strength under the guise of all your emotional
crap.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Building up... my inner strength?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But that person would need to be always with me
to do that... Um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait?! Trainer's always around...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since hearing Air Shakur's advice last time,
I've been extra conscious of Doto's training data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her record times have been steadily improving
ever since her debut. Maybe that has something
to do with today's result.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But, the real problem is from here on out.
Everyone else is just as ready as you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna take a whole lot more to keep the
turnaround. You have a threshold to pass...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're trying to overtake the generation ahead
of you, right? Hope you and Opera O are
prepared for despair.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've also gotta worry about me catching up,
after I get my Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Shakur...
